description: Call GET /api/v1/google/scholar/profiles for Google SERP Scholar Profiles through Just Serp API with mauthors.

operations.description: Get Google scholar Profiles data, including profile search results, affiliation and citation counts, and pagination tokens, for researcher discovery and academic directory building.

parameters.description: The search query for author profiles (e.g., 'John Smith', 'Harvard University').
parameters.name: mauthors

parameters.description: Token used to retrieve the next page of author profiles.
parameters.name: after_author

parameters.description: Token used to retrieve the previous page of author profiles.
parameters.name: before_author

responses.description: Authentication failed: API Key is invalid or missing
Access denied: Insufficient credits or quota exceeded
Internal server error or upstream service exception
